idea-plugin.name: Claude GUI
idea-plugin.description:
DEPRECATED — This plugin is no longer maintained. v0.2.15 is the final release.

Anthropic's Terms of Service now prevent third-party applications from using Claude Max/Pro subscription credentials to access premium models (Sonnet 4 / Opus 4). The direct SDK approach this plugin uses is limited to Haiku for subscription users — which defeats the entire point. Note: API key access technically still works, but this plugin was built specifically to leverage a Max subscription without needing a paid API plan. Without that use case, there's no reason to keep maintaining it.

Claude GUI - A visual interface for Claude Code in JetBrains IDEs. Brings Anthropic's AI programming assistant directly into your workflow.

Originally forked from idea-claude-code-gui by zhukunpenglinyutong — rewritten for English-only, Claude-only use.

Key Features

  • Interactive Claude Code session in a tool window
  • Native dialogs for interactive CLI prompts (AskUserQuestion, permissions, etc.)
  • Send editor selection to Claude (Cmd+Alt+K)
  • Slash command autocomplete

action.description: Send selected code to Claude input bar
